Reliance Industries Ltd.headline: Board approves scheme of demerger of O2C business
Reliance Industries Ltd.summary: Reliance Industries Ltd board approved a scheme to demerge its Oil-to-Chemicals business into a separate entity, Reliance O2C Ltd, pending shareholder and NCLT approval.

Reliance Industries Ltd.headline: Scheme of arrangement withdrawn — O2C demerger dropped
Reliance Industries Ltd.summary: Reliance Industries Ltd announced the withdrawal of its proposed O2C demerger scheme, citing changed business priorities and evolving regulatory environment.

Reliance Industries Ltd.headline: Board approves amalgamation of subsidiary companies into RIL
Reliance Industries Ltd.summary: The board approved a composite scheme for the merger of three wholly-owned subsidiaries into Reliance Industries Ltd effective from the appointed date of 1 April 2022.

HDFC Bank Ltd.headline: HDFC Ltd and HDFC Bank announce merger scheme
HDFC Bank Ltd.summary: HDFC Ltd and HDFC Bank Ltd announced a landmark reverse merger where HDFC Ltd will merge into HDFC Bank, creating India's largest private sector bank by assets.

HDFC Bank Ltd.headline: NCLT sanctioned scheme of merger — effective date 1 Jul 2023
HDFC Bank Ltd.summary: The National Company Law Tribunal sanctioned the amalgamation of HDFC Ltd into HDFC Bank. The scheme became effective from 1 July 2023, making HDFC Bank a fully integrated financial services giant.

Tata Motors Ltd.headline: Board approves demerger of commercial vehicle business
Tata Motors Ltd.summary: Tata Motors board approved a scheme to demerge its commercial vehicle division into a separate listed entity, subject to regulatory and shareholder approvals.

Tata Motors Ltd.headline: NCLT approved demerger — commercial vehicle entity effective
Tata Motors Ltd.summary: The NCLT sanctioned the demerger of Tata Motors commercial vehicle business. The resulting company stands effective from the appointed date of 1 January 2024.
